resources.string: Amounts in Brazilian reais with exact cents; accrual by income date.
Remember email and password on this device
Copyright © 2026 Andrino Cabral. All rights reserved.
Could not verify biometrics to use saved sign-in.
Saved sign-in data was invalid and was removed. Sign in with email and password.
Your saved session expired. Sign in with email and password, then turn on quick sign-in again in Security.
Could not sign in. Check your account or confirm your email.
Invalid data. Check email and password.
Could not reach the server. Try again.
Could not sign in. Try again.
Enter your account email. If it exists, we will send instructions.
I already have the link token
Paste the token from the recovery email and set a new password.
Paste the token you received by email.
Fill in the details to register.
Password must be at least 8 characters.
Enter the 6-digit code or paste the token from the link you received.
Enter the link token or the email with the 6-digit code.
Enter the email to resend the code.
This record already exists or is in conflict.
Sign in to see the monthly summary and spending by category.
No series data for the chart.
Tap the chart to see detail by month.
Enable at least one series in the legend.
Sign in to see announcements from the team.
No expenses in this period with the selected filters.
Same date sent as contract start (start_date).
This date sets each installment due date (one per month from this day). Together with the number of installments, it defines the whole plan.
Required for installments and recurring bills.
This cannot be undone in the app. Continue?
This plan has paid installments. Only future pending installments will be removed; paid records stay in history.
This plan has paid installments. Choose what to remove:
All installments, including those marked paid, will be removed. This cannot be undone in the app.
This expense belongs to another family member. View only.
Projected occurrence. You can mark as paid to record it.
No categories. Create categories on the server or refresh.
Enter a valid amount greater than zero.
No installments found for this plan.
Paid installments stay in history. Pending installments with due date after today will be removed.
The next step asks for final confirmation. Use this to fix mistakes (including removing paid rows).
Remove every line in this plan, including paid. Continue?
Only this date is removed. The rest of the series stays. If this line is the recurrence anchor, open the expense and stop the series there.
Type how many payments this plan has (2–999).
Join a family (invite) to use sharing.
Marked items appear in Family Mode for invited members.
Your part must match the total expense amount.
Choose a family member to split with.
%1$s already paid their share. You still owe %2$s.
Ask the other person to cover my share
The other person declined their share. Take over this line to continue.
You declined your share; the creator must take over this expense.
No pending balances between family members.
Choose an income category to record the repayment.
No income this month with the selected filters.
This cannot be undone in the app. Continue?
This income belongs to another family member. View only.
No income categories. Configure on the server or refresh.
Enter a valid amount greater than zero.
No goals yet. Tap + to create.
Tap the card to open the full page (contribute, update price, delete, …).
Another family member\'s goal — view only.
What you are saving for (e.g. Air conditioner 12000 BTUs).
Extra details used for price opportunity search.
Invalid due date. Use format YYYY-MM-DD.
We search Google Shopping (via SerpAPI on the server) using this text. Example: air conditioner 12000 BTUs.
Empty = search uses the title. Or type a different term, or paste a link with ?q=… / a product page (https).
Turn off to search only when you explicitly need it (saves data).
Turn on “Google Shopping price search” above to search for products.
Optional when creating. Use 0 or leave empty.
Easy mode: type a title (2+ characters) and we search for you. Optionally paste a search URL with ?q=… to sync the query, or a product page URL and use Get goal amount from this link below.
Search URLs load suggestions automatically. Product URLs are only for the fetch-price button.
Add a link first to update the reference price.
You can only delete if the recorded balance is zero. Continue?
You have unsaved changes. Leave this screen anyway?
Enter a valid target greater than zero.

Search uses the goal title (2+ characters), or a search URL (?q=…) in the optional field. Up to twelve Google Shopping matches open in a list — pick one to set the goal name, amount and link. No browser.
Pick a listing. The goal title will match the product name, and the target amount and link will be filled in.
Open the list to choose — the saved goal will use that exact name.
Enter at least 2 characters in the title.
Enter at least 2 characters in the title or in the optional field, or paste an https link.
Get goal amount from this link
No shopping results found. Try different words in the title or another search URL. The server needs SERPAPI_KEY for price search.
Update goal amount from product link
Sign in to see the emergency fund.
Set a monthly target below to start tracking.
Estimated time to reach ceiling: %1$d months
Open — no set duration in months
Set how much you want to save per month. The balance grows automatically with monthly accruals.
Shown after “Hello,” on the home header. Leave empty to use the first name from your registration.
Could not save. Check your connection and that the API is up to date (POST /auth/profile/display-name).
Enable vibration feedback in numeric keypads.
Hide target end date in the reserve plan form; it is still derived from the start date and validity months.
When off, the system blocks screen capture and recent-apps preview for privacy (same as before).
Show only your data and tagged family items.
Could not send e-mail to %1$s. Share the code manually.
This list could not be displayed. Try again or go back.
This draft will be removed. This cannot be undone.
Uses the server when the name has 2+ characters. Turn off to save data or avoid suggestions.
Reference prices (tap to fill unit cost)
Suggestions appear as you type (2+ characters) when the option above is on.
You can still save manually even if price search fails.
You can only view this draft.
You can still add items or adjust amounts; totals sync to the linked expense.
Creates a paid expense in BRL.
Use either manual total or discount, not both.
Sum of (cost per unit × quantity) on lines with a cost.
Only checked items are included in this total and when you complete the purchase.
No price yet (fill in at the store)
Mask only your balance; tap the balance to show it briefly.
Unlock with fingerprint or face; no PIN stored.
Try biometrics first; PIN as fallback.
On the login screen, use fingerprint or face instead of typing your password. Turn on and confirm with biometrics—your session is stored encrypted on this device only.
Could not enable quick sign-in. Check your connection and that you are signed in, then try again.
Turn on Remember credentials on the sign-in screen, sign in once, then enable quick sign-in here.
Biometrics are not available or not set up on this device.
Choose how to unlock when you return from another app.
Use fingerprint or face unlock when the app is locked.
Choose a 4–8 digit PIN. You will need it to unlock the app.
PIN must have at least 4 digits.
Your saved PIN will be removed from this device.
Use biometrics or your PIN to continue.
Use fingerprint or face to encrypt your credentials on this device
Authenticate to use your saved sign-in
Create a household to share visibility with family members, or join with an invite token.
If you are the owner and others remain, ownership passes to the longest-standing member. If you are alone, the household is deleted.
Add more members to your household to share expenses with someone specific.
Only the household owner can change the emergency reserve settings.
Enter a name for the plan.
Leave empty to use the monthly amount above.
Start date, months, and target end stay in sync when you edit them. If both months and end are set, the server uses one timeline (end date wins) so nothing is counted twice.
This reserve plan is no longer available.
No monthly rows to show yet.
Sets automatic monthly credits to your reserve.
Enter a valid duration in months.
Do you want to permanently delete this reserve plan?
Prioritize consistency: keep monthly contributions and reduce variable spending until the minimum core is built.
Reinforce discipline: keep automatic contributions and avoid using the reserve for non-emergency spending.
Consolidate liquidity: validate whether the amount covers your household real risks and adjust monthly target if needed.
With a protected base, surplus can gradually move to conservative investments (e.g., CDI/CDB) without compromising reserve liquidity.
Name each reserve plan with a clear purpose (e.g. 3 to 6 months bare minimum, or 12 months of spending). That way you can track more than one goal without mixing them mentally in the same “bucket”.
Review your main monthly target when your income or household costs change, so the automatic accrual stays in line with what you can really save each month.
Keep the truly emergency part in very liquid, low-volatility options. Use the Investments area only for amounts you know are above a safe cushion, not the core you might need in days.
Do not use this money for normal shopping or “planned” purchases. If you have to use it, try to start topping it up again the same month or the next, before other discretionary spending.
More than one plan: how to “rebalance” in practice

When you have several plans, the balance in the app still comes from the same accrual stream. The ceiling on each plan helps you see when you can move a surplus to investments without touching the cushion you need for the next few months. Adjust targets when life changes, not only when a plan is “full”.
Track daily yield and CDI benchmark for liquid applications.
Compare return by maturity and CDI percentage for each position.
Consolidate conservative positions and signal portfolio distribution.
Session expired. Sign in again to save your position.
Search and add position (e.g. PETR4, CDB, CDI)
Type an exact ticker to open directly. Turn on family search to browse list.
For stocks/FII/BDR/ETF, enter quantity and average price.
For crypto, fetch a quote before saving the position.
With the informed amount, you can buy at most %1$d share(s). We adjusted it to %2$s. Do you want to proceed? Tap save again.
Automatic market rate is available for CDI, CDB, or general fixed income.
The contribution amount does not match the minimum for 1 share (R$ %1$s).
Review the adjustment and tap save again to confirm.
Enter a B3 ticker in the name field (e.g. PETR4) before requesting a quote.
Enter a crypto symbol (e.g. BTC) before requesting a quote.
Data provider is rate-limited. Try again later (source: %1$s).
Price history for crypto is not available in the app yet.
The start date is before today: %1$d month(s) already count toward the plan and %2$d month(s) remain until the target date. To reach the %3$s goal, the suggested corrected monthly amount is %4$s.

Cash balance is this amount plus recorded contributions. The monthly breakdown uses real deposits. If you start late and leave this empty, balance stays at R$ 0,00 until you contribute — check “pace” (delta) for how far behind the schedule you are.
This month contribution on selected plan (BRL)
